violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Vent hood does not cover all equipment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Ice machine needs cleaned.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
